body:
Changes: * Memory usage calculations now exclude the ZFS ARC cache on Linux, FreeBSD, NetBSD, and SunOS. (#1995 / #2418, Memory) * This prevents the Memory module from reporting artificially high memory usage on systems with the ZFS kmod enabled. Bugfixes: * The GPU module no longer pings sleeping dedicated GPUs on dual-GPU laptops. (#2419, GPU) * As a result, PCIe link speed detection (introduced in v2.65.0) is now only enabled in `driverSpecific` mode. * Fixed a crash when detecting hardware codec support with the `amdgpu` driver on Linux. (#2419, Codec, Linux) Logos: * Updated CachyOS_small; fixed CachyOS logo colors to match the official logo better * Added Turkish ---
